key_metric_drivers: Decreasing rejections per successful ride: 1.8 (down by 1.2333)
pm_perspective: Riders are benefiting from transparent visibility of driver rejection counts, which contributes to trust without breaking core funnel health.
The feature is helping retain riders by reducing the likelihood of repeated requests due to unavailability or poor communication from drivers.

reliability_perspective.summary: Ride confirmation strengthens with a 84.9% success rate, driver acceptance increases to 74.9%, and rejections per successful ride decrease to 1.8. Rejection count visibility delivers transparency without compromising the core funnel health.
findings: Confirmation time remains within guardrails at 110 seconds.
Driver rejection counts are effectively monitored, with no high-severity risk flags identified.
reliability_perspective.recommendation: Continue rollout with routine monitoring to ensure sustained improvements in ride confirmation and driver acceptance.

business_perspective.summary: Ride-Booking Launch Sees Strengthened Ride Confirmation, Driver Acceptance, and Contained Drop-off/Churn with Rejection Count Visibility Delivered without Breaking Core Funnel Health.
findings: The introduction of rejection count visibility during ride search has led to a strengthening of ride confirmation rates, as drivers are more likely to accept rides when they know the rider will see the rejection reason.
Driver acceptance rates have also seen an improvement, with a decrease in rejections per successful ride, indicating that riders are more willing to accept rides from drivers with good ratings.
business_perspective.recommendation: Continue to roll out the feature with routine monitoring and support to ensure seamless user experience.

risk_register.risk: Residual risk is limited to normal marketplace variance; current trajectory supports continued rollout.
risk_register.mitigation: Keep six-hour metric reviews and align new experiments with existing guardrails.

action_plan_24_48h.action: Continue phased rollout with zone-level guardrails
Monitor confirmation, drop-off, and rejection metrics every 6 hours
Keep support macros ready for emerging complaint clusters

communication_plan.internal: Proceed with confidence; maintain standard monitoring and weekly status updates.
communication_plan.external: Announce wider rollout of rejection-count transparency as a rider trust and decision-aid improvement.

what_would_increase_confidence: Zone-level analysis of rejection count impact on rider behavior
Segmented elasticity analysis by trip distance/time band
Post-intervention 24h confirmation and drop-off trend stability

agent_summaries.pm: The feature is strengthening ride confirmation, driver acceptance, and transparency by providing visible rejection counts during ride search. Metrics show a contained drop-off in churn and a falling rejections per success rate.
agent_summaries.data: Ride-booking platform shows promising early signs with ride confirmation and driver acceptance rates improving, rejection counts decreasing, and drop-off contained.
agent_summaries.comms: Our ride search feature is performing well, with a strengthening ride confirmation rate and increasing driver acceptance. We've also seen a significant reduction in rejections per successful ride, indicating that riders are getting closer to finding the right drivers.
agent_summaries.risk: Ride confirmation rates are strengthening, with a 9.6% increase in the overall confirmation rate and a 74.9% driver acceptance rate. Rejection counts during ride search are visible to users, providing transparency without breaking the core funnel health. Contained drop-off and churn rates are also falling.
agent_summaries.reliability: Ride confirmation strengthens with a 84.9% success rate, driver acceptance increases to 74.9%, and rejections per successful ride decrease to 1.8. Rejection count visibility delivers transparency without compromising the core funnel health.
agent_summaries.business: Ride-Booking Launch Sees Strengthened Ride Confirmation, Driver Acceptance, and Contained Drop-off/Churn with Rejection Count Visibility Delivered without Breaking Core Funnel Health.
